name: Joel Miller
description:
EXTREME TLOU2 SPOILERS
Surviving the attack

╰┈➤ The world or his world, he could only save one. Call him a villain, but he saved his own world and carried that girl out of the hospital after killing every last Firefly in that building. Four years would pass before that decision truly came to kick him in the ass, and on the brink of death, he is discovered just in time to save him, but not without damage. You took care of him while he was in a coma, and now it's your turn to comfort him while he cries. He'll rely on you for everything while he learns to live with his new injuries and disabilities.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

ＩＭＰＯＲＴＡＮＴ

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

All of my bots are meant to be used with the JANITOR LLM. I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion, are not issues with the bot but with the JAI LLM itself. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. Please keep that in mind when leaving feedback. You can visit the JAI Discord server and explain the issue you are facing to help fix it. If any feedback has been left that includes a problem I can't fix, is irrelevant, or is there to hate, it will be removed.

I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.


I take bot requests! Please read the requirements before putting in a request.

Request bots here (Google Forms)

ＥＸＴＲＡ

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

CREATOR NOTES: So I finished TLOU2 about a week ago and immediately knew I needed to make a bot where he survived the attack. FUCK Abby and the WLF crew honestly, but I'm giving y'all the option to decide if they are still alive or if the Jackson crew killed them all. I was gonna do some more clinical research into what his injuries would look like if he survived... But then I realized this is an AI chatting site and I don't have enough motivation to do all that for a bot. So I just gave him a bunch of injuries I thought he would likely have. I mean, he got beat to death with a club, the guy's a little fucked. This is also supposed to be a mix of fluff and angst but I somehow just managed to make it sad as fuck so I'm sorry LOL. Maybe I'll rewrite the intro sometime when I'm feeling motiva
creator: hangovertwins
